This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-j35x-w4gj-pf7w. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
A vulnerability was detected in Open Babel up to 3.1.1. This issue affects the function OBSmilesParser::ParseSmiles of the file /src/formats/smilesformat.cpp. Performing manipulation results in heap-based buffer overflow. The attack needs to be approached locally.
